Job Title: Senior Business Analyst – Procurement | Defence ERP.
Ad Text:
Senior Business Analyst – Procurement | Defence ERP | SAP S/4HANA

Blooming People is excited to be the exclusive recruitment partner for a boutique consultancy that is building strong momentum in Defence and is now expanding its team.

Join a critical Defence ERP program supporting the CASG Commercial Division in Melbourne.

This is a high-impact opportunity for a senior procurement-focused Business Analyst who understands how complex procurement environments actually work. You’ll play a key role across the Procure-to-Pay (P2P) value chain, helping shape business processes, improve compliance, support ERP adoption, and strengthen the way procurement operates within a highly governed Defence environment.

Why this role stands out

Work on a major Defence ERP program with visible organisational impact

Use your SAP S/4HANA and procurement expertise in a role that goes beyond documentation

Influence process, policy, training, and stakeholder adoption across the P2P lifecycle

Partner with Defence and industry stakeholders on complex procurement outcomes

Melbourne-based full-time role with Baseline clearance required and the ability to gain NV1

About the role

You’ll support the Commercial function across end-to-end procurement activities within the wider Defence ERP environment. This is not a passive note-taking BA role. You’ll be expected to bring sound judgement, work with a high level of autonomy, and help translate complex procurement requirements into practical, compliant, workable processes.

What you’ll be doing

Map, analyse and improve procurement business processes across the P2P value chain

Support SAP S/4HANA-aligned process design, documentation and business readiness

Ensure workflows and documentation remain aligned to Defence procurement policy and frameworks

Work closely with Defence stakeholders to support consistency, adoption and procurement outcomes

Help identify where policy, training, templates and process guidance need to be updated

Contribute to the knowledge base, templates and supporting artefacts used within the new ERP environment

What you’ll bring

To succeed in this role, you’ll bring a strong mix of procurement domain knowledge, SAP capability, and stakeholder credibility.

You will likely have:

Hands-on transactional experience with SAP S/4HANA and confidence navigating SAP ERP environments

A background in commercial or procurement roles, ideally in Defence or the public sector

Strong understanding of Commonwealth procurement and the Procure-to-Pay (P2P) value chain

Experience working within complex, highly governed procurement environments

The ability to engage confidently with stakeholders at multiple levels

A proactive, self-directed approach and the judgement to operate effectively with minimal supervision

Why high-calibre candidates apply

Top candidates are usually drawn to roles where they can do meaningful work, influence how things operate, and build credibility on major programs. This role offers all three. You’ll be joining a complex transformation environment where your procurement expertise, SAP knowledge, and ability to navigate policy-driven decision-making will be genuinely valued.

Location & clearance

Location: Melbourne

Role type: Full-time

Clearance: Baseline required, with ability to gain NV1

Apply now

This role will suit a senior analyst who understands procurement in practice, can work comfortably in structured environments, and wants to contribute to a significant Defence program rather than just support it from the sidelines.
